Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order:

Motion granted.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
